Today, we are announcing that we have entered into a definitive agreement to acquire @confluentinc. This is a decisive step that accelerates our hybrid cloud and AI strategy. Learn more: https://t.co/iDGA9WeuDW https://t.co/Kcm1fR2VDt

During this year’s Atlantic Festival, I sat down with @TheAtlantic ‘s staff writer @Tyrangiel to discuss the current state of AI, and share insights about the next big paradigm shift in technology, quantum computing.

Watch the replay here: https://t.co/sbCHUFwGIr  #TAF25 https://t.co/8cXqENHyUv

·@IBM is advancing quantum systems to take on problems classical computers can’t—from chemistry to materials to finance.

.@IBM is proud to join the Pledge to America’s Youth by committing to skill 2 million Americans in AI by 2028. We thank the Administration for their leadership in advancing AI education and for bringing public and private partners together to prepare for an AI-driven future.

IBM has announced its path to build a fault-tolerant quantum computer. IBM Quantum Starling, projected to be operational by 2029, is being developed in Poughkeepsie, New York—a site integral to @IBM's computing legacy. Learn about the pursuit of valuable and scalable quantum https://t.co/BeAdblUJGN

Simplifying operations, securing data, and improving efficiency and scale are priorities for @IBM clients. Enterprise AI can make a meaningful difference. We've built solutions ready to deploy and help unlock the full potential of #AI. More here: https://t.co/VMzVk0Tqga https://t.co/HWgmbwsyVI

#AI is projected to enhance human productivity and unlock an astounding $16T in value by 2030. But, as with any other powerful technology, AI has the potential for both misuse and risk. I enjoyed talking with @jchatterleyCNN about @IBM's 10-year, $100 million initiative to develop a quantum supercomputer on @firstmove. Hear more: https://t.co/JhNMdu8kdG

Today, all of IBM is celebrating the remarkable life of Gordon Moore, the self-described “accidental entrepreneur” whose $500 investment in the nascent microchip industry helped build both the digital world we know — and the one that’s still on the horizon.

“Thank you” to all IBMers. I’m proud of what we have achieved this year, and I am excited for the road ahead and what we will accomplish together, serving our clients across the world. Today and every day, I believe @IBM's greatest strength is the IBMer. #ProudIBMer

Sustainability is in @IBM's DNA, and we’re excited to be a part of #COP27. Learn more about our refreshed #sustainability strategy: https://t.co/dfMEQy7w2G https://t.co/eZ6X69yshB

IBM is proud to help our clients implement their sustainability goals through data-driven innovation with industry-leading consulting and technology capabilities. We use these solutions ourselves as client zero for sustainability initiatives. #WorldSustainabilityDay

Honored to welcome @POTUS to IBM Poughkeepsie, where we design and manufacture the mainframes that power the global economy and home of IBM's Quantum Computation Center. IBM plans to invest $20B in R&D across the Hudson Valley region over the next 10 years https://t.co/sZHE84cV7i https://t.co/qvQEJIRsEX

President Biden's visit highlights the impact of the CHIPS and Science Act on innovation and manufacturing here in the Hudson Valley and across the country. I thank @POTUS, @SenSchumer and leaders in Congress for making this once-in-a-generation investment in American innovation.
I look forward to welcoming @POTUS to @IBM Poughkeepsie later this week, and to highlighting our commitments to the technology and innovation here in the Hudson Valley that advance America’s economy.

I am proud to share that IBM has announced its collaboration with 20 Historically Black Universities (HBCUs) to help them establish Cybersecurity Leadership Centers. Learn more about this #skillsbuild commitment to STEM education:  https://t.co/XWLzWfxao3 https://t.co/EO4gsY29kE

When it comes to protecting the environment, we can either be a part of the problem or a part of the solution. At IBM, we have always believed in being a part of the solution - and that our technology can make a profound difference. Thank you, @Mukesh_IBM and #SEMICONWest. https://t.co/NHt5nVxKdt
